parameters.query:
-- Query token costs from gemini_copy_drafts
SELECT
  COALESCE(model, 'unknown') as model,
  COUNT(*) as n_calls_24h,
  SUM(COALESCE(tokens_in, 0)) as total_tokens_in,
  SUM(COALESCE(tokens_out, 0)) as total_tokens_out,
  SUM(COALESCE(tokens_in, 0) * CASE
    WHEN model = 'gemini-2.5-flash' THEN 0.075
    WHEN model = 'gemini-2.5-pro' THEN 1.25
    ELSE 0.075
  END / 1000000 +
  COALESCE(tokens_out, 0) * CASE
    WHEN model = 'gemini-2.5-flash' THEN 0.30
    WHEN model = 'gemini-2.5-pro' THEN 10.0
    ELSE 0.30
  END / 1000000) as cost_usd_24h
FROM adoff_autopilot.gemini_copy_drafts
WHERE created_at >= NOW() - INTERVAL '24 hours'
GROUP BY model
ORDER BY cost_usd_24h DESC;

-- Query monthly costs
SELECT
  COALESCE(model, 'unknown') as model,
  COUNT(*) as n_calls_month,
  SUM(COALESCE(tokens_in, 0)) as total_tokens_in,
  SUM(COALESCE(tokens_out, 0)) as total_tokens_out,
  SUM(COALESCE(tokens_in, 0) * CASE
    WHEN model = 'gemini-2.5-flash' THEN 0.075
    WHEN model = 'gemini-2.5-pro' THEN 1.25
    ELSE 0.075
  END / 1000000 +
  COALESCE(tokens_out, 0) * CASE
    WHEN model = 'gemini-2.5-flash' THEN 0.30
    WHEN model = 'gemini-2.5-pro' THEN 10.0
    ELSE 0.30
  END / 1000000) as cost_usd_month
FROM adoff_autopilot.gemini_copy_drafts
WHERE created_at >= date_trunc('month', NOW())
GROUP BY model
ORDER BY cost_usd_month DESC;

options.queryReplacement: =warning,{{ $json.daily_cost_eur }},{{ $json.monthly_cost_eur }},{{ $json.n_calls_24h }},{{ 'Daily Gemini spend ' + $json.daily_cost_eur + ' EUR reached warning threshold (>= 2 EUR)' }}

=critical,{{ $json.daily_cost_eur }},{{ $json.monthly_cost_eur }},{{ $json.n_calls_24h }},{{ 'CRITICAL: Daily Gemini spend ' + $json.daily_cost_eur + ' EUR exceeded limit (>= 5 EUR). Disabling Gemini workflows.' }}

=critical,{{ $json.daily_cost_eur }},{{ $json.monthly_cost_eur }},{{ $json.n_calls_24h }},{{ 'CRITICAL: Monthly Gemini spend ' + $json.monthly_cost_eur + ' EUR exceeded limit (>= 30 EUR). Review budget immediately.' }}

parameters.query:
INSERT INTO adoff_autopilot.workflow_kill_switch (workflow_id, disabled, reason)
VALUES ('w20-gemini-copywriter-caption', true, 'Daily budget threshold exceeded: ' || $1 || ' EUR')
ON CONFLICT (workflow_id) DO UPDATE SET disabled = true, reason = EXCLUDED.reason, set_at = NOW()
RETURNING workflow_id, disabled, reason;

INSERT INTO adoff_autopilot.workflow_kill_switch (workflow_id, disabled, reason)
VALUES ('w20-gemini-copywriter-caption', true, 'Monthly budget threshold exceeded: ' || $1 || ' EUR')
ON CONFLICT (workflow_id) DO UPDATE SET disabled = true, reason = EXCLUDED.reason, set_at = NOW()
RETURNING workflow_id, disabled, reason;
